title: 2 Free Printables for you!
excerpt: I’ve got 2 free printables to share with you inspired by this YouTube video . Feel free to print out the one that’s already filled in for you or the one where you write your own in the colored bubbles.…
body:
I’ve got 2 free printables to share with you inspired by this YouTube video.

Feel free to print out the one that’s already filled in for you or the one where you write your own in the colored bubbles. If you care to share on social media, please tag me so I can get more ideas!

DOWNLOAD THE PRE-FILLED ONE

DOWNLOAD THE BLANK ONE
